resize image to circle from path
resize image retain ratio from path
resize image to square from path
set image color filter from path

Failed to save to my collection
Failed to connect to the server
Unknown error! Please contact the administrator
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
There are no items to delete
"There is not enough space available in the storage. Please make room and try again"
We need your permission to Storage to save and load projects
To access photos, media, and files, please give Sketchware permission in the next step
"Permission Denied. Please click on Settings to allow permission for Storage. Without this permission, some features may not function properly"
The docs page will be updated soon
Bluetooth Connect is used to connect to another device via Bluetooth.
Calendar is used to calculate time and date
Camera is used to take a picture.
Dialog is used to create a pop-up
File is used to save data locally
FilePicker is used to select raw and media files, such as images, sounds, and text.
"MIME type is used to identify a type of data. ex)\"*/*\", \"image/*\", \"audio/*\", \"text/*\""
Firebase Auth allows online user authentication
Firebase Storage is built for app developers who need to store and serve user-generated content.
"The gyroscope measures the rate of rotation in rad/s around a device's x, y, and z axis."
Intent is used to start a new Activity
Interstitial Ad lets you add fullscreen advertisements.
LocationManager is used to load a data of the current location
MediaPlayer is used to play big sound files
ObjectAnimator is used to animate certain properties of a View
RequestNetwork is used to make Web API calls
SoundPool is used to play short sound effects
SpeechToText is used to convert speech to text
TextToSpeech is used to convert text to speech
Timer is used to delay certain actions
Vibrator is used vibrate the device
New blocks have been added in the Logic Editor
You don\'t have any %s here yet, try creating one.
View built-in Java and XML files
In order to use this component, you have to setup the settings in the Library Manager first.
AdMob is a mobile advertisement platform provided by Google. Monetize your apps by adding AdMob.
You are about to delete the selected Ad Unit. Are you sure?
You are about to delete the selected Test Device ID. Are you sure?
If you uncheck the option for AdMob, existing AdMob widgets and components will be deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?
Request for Ad unit failed. Please double check your AdMob account [%s].
No test device ID to display
No ad unit ID to display
Please select appropriate ad Unit for each item
At least one ad Unit ID is needed
The unique ID assigned to your app. You\'ll need to add the app ID here.
First, you need to create Ad Units inside the AdMob console. Add the created ad units manually or by linking your AdMob account.
Assign Ad Unit IDs to the Banner and Interstitial ads.
If you test AdMob without adding your device ID, your AdMob account may be banned. Please add your device ID.
Please review the information below. If they are all correct, click on \"Save\".
In order to use this widget, you have to setup the settings in the Library Manager first.
Activating App Compat library will let you add Drawer Layout and Floating Action Button to the Activities.

Enabling Material 3 will enable the latest Material You design principles in your app, providing a more modern and visually appealing interface with customizable components and advanced theming options.

Please note that enabling this library may have an impact on the overall design and appearance of the app, particularly if it’s an older project. It’s recommended to verify the changes and ensure compatibility with your current setup before activation.

Choosing a theme mode lets you personalize the app\'s appearance, notes:\n 1. Selecting a `DayNight` theme for an adaptive experience that automatically switches between `Light` and `Dark` based on system settings\n 2. This setting also affects the EditorView, eg: with DayNight enabled, the editor colors will follow the system\'s theme and switch between light and dark accordingly.

Enabling Dynamic Colors allows your app to adapt its color scheme based on the user\'s system preferences, creating a seamless and personalized experience that reflects the user\'s chosen theme and appearance.
You can not disable the AppCompat Library when Firebase is in use.
You can not disable the AppCompat Library when Material3 and Dynamic Colors is in use.
If enabled, you will be able to use Firebase DB, Auth, and Storage Components.
"Firebase Realtime Database is Google's cloud-based NoSQL database, where you can save and sync data realtime."
Project ID, App ID, and API Key must match the values inside the Firebase Console.
Storage Bucket URL must match the value in Firebase Storage for it to work properly.
If you uncheck the option for Firebase DB, existing Firebase components will be deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?
In order to use this component, you have to setup the API Key in the Firebase Settings first.
Full Database URL, App ID, and API Key must be filled out.
AppCompat Library will be enabled since Firebase requires AppCompat as a dependency.
Enter Full Database URL, Web API Key, and App ID
Please review the information below. If they are all correct, click on \"Save\"..
"Google Map View can be operated. You must enter the API key to operate the map normally."
In order to use this component, you have to setup the settings in the Library Manager first.
The existing Drawer Layout and FAB will be deleted. Would you like to continue?
The existing MapView will be deleted. Would you like to continue?
Including the library may slow down the compilation time on certain devices.
"Please refer to the tutorial if it's your first time setting up."

Apply same naming style to other available images

You have to select a new font

Apply same naming style to other available sounds
To create a new Activity, add it here
Create a new Custom View here
Custom View can be used to change the way items are displayed inside the ListView or the Spinner

Recently used properties will be displayed

Break block can only be used inside the repeat or forever blocks

Only use letters(a-z), numbers and Special characters(.)
Only use letters(a-z), numbers and Special characters(_)
Only use small letters(a-z), numbers and special character(_)
Are you sure you want to delete your saved block from My Collection? This action can not be undone.
Saved blocks are added to My Collection and are accessible from all the projects.

"Selected list is currently used Please try again after removing the blocks with this list"
"Selected variable is currently used Please try again after removing the blocks with this variable"
A valid name for Moreblock is required
Select a block you want to copy
The variable name must start with a letter
Your current work will be lost
* Enter a new name for the block
The selected string is currently in use in your project.\nPlease try again after removing all instances
"Variables and resources in moreblock are added automatically. Do you want to continue? But, components should be added manually for working correctly."
The name of moreblock is duplicated. Please edit the name of moreblock.
If you save this block, you can use this block in all projects.
Save More Block to My Collection

Included resources are added to collection automatically.
The exported url is not existed.

Are you sure you want to delete your saved widget from My Collection? This action can not be undone.
Images used in the widget are added to this project.
Saved widgets are saved to My Collection and are accessible from all the projects.
If you save this widget, this widget will be added to widget collection and images used in this widget will be added to image collection automatically. Saved widget can be used in all projects.

Video Ad lets you add video advertisements
FragmentStatePagerAdapter uses with TabLayout and ViewPager to manage each page.
Firebase Phone is used with Firebase Auth to sign into your app with a phone number
Firebase Dynamic Links are smart URLs that allow you to send existing and potential users to any location within your app
Firebase Cloud Messaging is used to send and receive push notifications
Firebase Google Sign is used with Firebase Auth to sign into your app with a Google account
OneSignal is the market leader in customer engagement, powering mobile push, web push, email, and in-app messages
Facebook Ads Banner is used to display an ad banner with Facebook ads
Facebook Ads Interstitial is used to display interstitial ads with Facebook ads
Encrypt strings in your app at compilation time
Edit any Java and XML file
Activating R8/ProGuard will minimize and obfuscate your project by renaming existing classes and methods on compilation time.
Using R8/ProGuard might be risky to some extent. Make sure to provide a proper rules configuration file in order not to break your project.
Configure R8/ProGuard by editing the rules file. This step is necessary because without a proper configuration, ProGuard might break your project.

Using this, you can configure specific local libs to be included in R8/ProGuarding process. (Note: Enabling this will ignore DEX files of the local libs you select and it will force Sketchware to compile them to dex, making compilation noticeably slower.)
You can find the dependency of a library in GitHub, typically in the Readme file.
You don\'t have any Local libraries yet, try downloading one.
You don\'t have any files here yet, try creating one.
Don\'t worry, it won\'t take more than a second.
Something went wrong. Please wait and try again.
All features related to %1$s will be removed. Are you sure?
Are you sure you want to delete this project named %1$s?
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to exit?
Nothing found,\ntry again with something else
data loading failed in \"%s\" \nPlease open the code editor to fix the issue manually
Changing the `app_name` value will directly affect this project\'s application name
Changing primary colors will affect the app\'s visual theme, including buttons and highlights
You have unsaved changes in \"%s\"\nDo you want to save your changes before quitting?
You have unsaved changes in \"%s\"\nDo you want to save your changes before changing the variant?

"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your tablet."

"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.

Automatically check new noticec from the server

"
Get the data from Intent
*Only the value saved by Intent PutExtra block can be retrieved
*Get the empty string() when the key does not exist
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "
Sets the specified variable to the condition

"
Adds the given amount of time to the Calendar field
*Positive Value : adds time
*Negative Value : subtracts time
*You need to add 'Calendar' from [Component] to use this"

"
Get the differences between the given calendars (time)
Unit : Seconds
*You need to add 'Calendar' from [Component] to use this "

"
Formats the Calendar as a string using the pattern
Year(y) | Month(m) | Day(d)
Hour(h) 1~12 | Hour(H) 0~23 | Minute(M) | Second(s)
Ex : yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss ( 2106-01-01 03:01:02 )
Ex : yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss ( 2106-01-01 15:01:02 )
Ex : yyyy-MM-dd ( 2106-01-01 )
Ex : hh:mm:ss ( 12:01:02 )
*A run-time error if the given string format is invalid
*You need to add 'Calendar' from [Component] to use this "

"
Get the current date and time
*You need to add 'Calendar' from [Component] to use this "

"
Sets the Calendar field to a specific value
*You need to add 'Calendar' from [Component] to use this "

"
Get the status of a checkbox
True if checked, else false"

"
Set the status of a checkbox
Checked if set true, else unchecked"
The condition for checking if two strings are equal

"
Retrieve a value from the preference file
The value saved by File SetData block can be retrieved
*You need to add 'File(Shared Preference)' from [Component] to use this "
remove file data with the following key

"
Set a value in the preference file
*Application can have multiple files and a file can have multiple values
*the keys in the file must be unique. If same key is used several times, only the latest saved value is accessible
*format - key : value
Ex) key : new_memo , value : hello
*You need to add 'File(Shared Preference)' from [Component] to use this "

A loop that will never end
* this must be used with stop block
Get the text the widget is displaying

"
Checks the condition - if the condition is true, the blocks inside the first C will activate, and if the condition is false, the blocks inside the second C will activate
"
Checks the condition - if the condition is true, the blocks inside it will activate
When application is executed, the block activates
Sets the specified variable to the number

"
Bind the data to Intent

*Send to Activity with key : value format


*Intent can have multiple keys and values
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "

"
Set the Intent action to be performed

Intent : a component for load a Activity(view)
-ACTION_CALL : Perform a call to someone specified by the data(permission:CALL_PHONE)
-ACTION_DIAL : Dial a number as specified by the data(no permission)
-ACTION_VIEW : Display the data to the user
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "

"
Set the data this Intent is operating on

-ACTION_CALL : must start with tel:
(EX:tel:021111111)
-ACTION_DIAL : must start with tel:
(EX:tel:021111111)
-ACTION_VIEW : must follow URL form starting with http: or https:
(EX: http://google.com)
*A run-time error may occur if you don't follow the recommendation
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "

"
Set the Activity(View) to be performed
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "
An index is either negative or greater than or equal to the size of the list
An integer cannot be divided by zero
An index is either negative or greater than the size of the string
Thrown to indicate that the application has attempted to convert a string to one of the numeric types
Unreachable statement or stop block outside repeat block or forever block
<h4>Occurred when parameters of Intent is invalid</h4
The two values put right next to each other
Adds an item to the list (the item goes at the bottom of the list of items) with the specified content in it

"
The condition for checking if an item's content is the specified text
"
Adds an item to the list (the item goes where you specify in the list of items) with the specified content in it.
How many items there are in the specified list

"
Get the number of selected ListView items
Only Works when the ChoiceMode for the ListView is either single or multi "

"
Get the index of selected ListView item
Only Works when the ChoiceMode for the ListView is either single or multi "

"
Get an array of indices for the selected ListView items
Only Works when the ChoiceMode for the ListView is either single or multi "

"
Select a ListView item at a given index
Only Works when the ChoiceMode for the ListView is either single or multi
Setting an index greater than the number of items in the ListView will result in runtime error "
The condition for checking if a value is greater than the other
The condition for checking if a value is less than the other
The condition for checking if two values are equal
Makes the condition checked if it is false, not true
Joins two conditions, but they function separately
Picks a random number between the two limits
A loop that repeats for the specified amount
Sets the background color for the widget
Sets the enabled state of the widget
Sets selected image as the content of the ImageView

"
Set ListView Data
Setting the data for a ListView
Data Format: String"

"
Set Spinner Data

Set Spinner Data
Data Format: String"
Sets the text color of the widget

"
Set the visibility of a widget
Visibility Properties
- VISIBLE : This view is visible
- INVISIBLE : This view is invisible, but it still takes up space for layout purposes
- GONE : This view is invisible, and it doesn't take any space for layout purposes"

"
Get the index of selected spinner item/h5>
Index starts from 0"

"
Refresh Spinner
Refresh List Item using Spinner "

"
Select a spinner item at a given index
Setting an index greater than the number of items in the spinner will result in runtime error "

"
Launch a new Activity by Intent
*A run-time error may occur if the Intent parameters is invalid
*You need to add 'Intent' in [Component] to use this "
The first index of the given string, or -1
Sets the specified variable to the string
A string containing the given subsequence of the string
Returns a string with no spaces at the beginning or end

"
Vibrate for the set amount of time
- Time Unit: millisecond
* You need to add 'Vibrator' from [Component] to use this "

*You need to enable automatic login to use this feature

The variable name must start with a letter

Stop block does not exist in forever block
Only use letters(a-z), numbers and Special characters(.),(@)
Only use letters(a-z), numbers and Special characters(.)
Only use letters(a-z), numbers and Special characters(_)
Only use small letters(a-z), numbers and special character(_)
Project name must be at least %d characters

E-mail address to receive One Time Password
"Touch this area And select an image you want to add"
Explain about your application in a few sentences
This will be the title for the post
Create an application that outputs an input string
Create a Baseball - Bulls and Cows game
You can make a source code to be linked specific URL
Create a clicking speed test application
Create a match pairs memory game
Create an application that gets current time
"Use a widget that takes a user input Add a function to a button Show a message box (Toast)"
"Select rock, paper, or scissors A.I. also chooses rock, paper, or scissors Compare and decide who won"

"Select a random 3-digit number Digits must be all different You can delete one digit at a time Decide strike(Bulls) or ball(Cows) * strike(Bulls) if you guess the right digit in right position * ball(Cows) if the digit you guessed in different positions * example : Random Number - 123, Your Guess: 132 * output : 1 strike, 2 ball Record your attempts Continue until you guess the correct number"
"Arithmetic operations (+, -, x, /) Don't allow divisions by zero "
"Save title and message Show the saved list of memos Edit the saved memo Delete the saved memo Start a new activity for Memo Editor "
"Set specific URL Implement slide menu You can use a Calling function Implement back to the top"
"Place random numbers Check the clicking sequence Disable clicked numbers Show the time taken"
"Place pictures in random positions Display hidden images on start If two selected pictures are the same, then display them; otherwise, hide them Stop when all pictures are displayed "
"Add a calendar component Set date format "
"Take an input URL string Open the browser using Intent "
"Generate a random number between 0 to 9 Compare the input number to the random number Notify the input number is bigger or less than the random number "
"Generate a random number between 1 and 45 each time a button is clicked Duplicate numbers are not allowed "
"New! You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
